🇺🇲
1) [Generate a URL](https://pretpo.st#GYVwdgxgLglg9mABDMMoAoCUBvCCDOUiUAvOlADRgUCmFcmJAfLgUQA4kAmcEIAtjTBQAdBABONAIZQaAUQA2NQcPKYA3JKghxSGgDJ96dmIVT8+AHJTBJGpiogFCgIQk4h4yIAq7h2EMwEQBBAGFjB3YAX3UMACJCAE8lOIoePhVRAAtpLkwfEjiAHSCFAC8AWjxhKRQacWxgBCgK4BsYBUSALmDxGCkFCnwpMHwK-HqYYHV+KQAPCoB3GC4oLK6AdgAGLfY5malxAHMULoAWXbnEKRAoOHV2KS4uFCOurcQAJkuokpFyqrNWpgerEGhzKCHaTYZardYARh2AFJ1DkYEcslAuvCAKyXA7HFAVABGcCgd342Pxj2erype3UpIW+BgZTppPEXHqJLg+yawnGrJo2LOe1+pUq1UhdXEiGJtzuYGwNJeYDeiL2X3x-JaLLKwvhov2fHE+Dg4i67DgKFk4gJJzAFT6GKxAA4GbNCY7SeS4JSNXNxf9JUCZYh-lJiTQFI1mksaOjMV1SQouPaiXd2NiAGwew4Onm+ylGoMAqXA0EiOC3di3HlzbCeguZrru--SECEDBhvUFaSDAAB+EWpraDoaC4Yg4EQOn9osJbnsm2z6YMixpcCmryLBhxxEhpqYewUIAAV0BW-I1iEaHGBYA3fDiPT2BgaWXFSbxbeYB3CmdgKXJ14zcR2TA9bDlA0CwdQgA).

Limitations: To prevent abuse, external files and external network connections are not allowed.

Available libraries: LZString + [GolfJS](https://github.com/pretpo/GolfJS)

🇸🇹
1) [Gere uma URL](https://pretpo.st#GYVwdgxgLglg9mABDMMoAoCUBvCCDOUiUAvOlADRgUCmFcmJAfLgUQA4kAmcEIAtjTBQAdBABONAIZQaAUQA2NQcPKYA3JKghxSGgDJ96dmIVT8+AHJTBJGpiogFCgIQk4h4yIAq7h2EMwEQBBAGFjB3YAX3UMACJCAE8lOIoePhVRAAtpLkwfEjiAHSCFAC8AWjxhKRQacWxgBCgK4BsYBUSALmDxGCkFCnwpMHwK-HqYYHV+KQAPCoB3GC4oLK6AdgAGLfY5malxAHMULoAWXbnEKRAoOHV2KS4uFCOurcQAJkuokpFyqrNWpgerEGhzKCHaTYZardYARh2AFJ1DkYEcslAuvCAKyXA7HFAVABGcCgd342Pxj2erype3UpIW+BgZTppPEXHqJLg+yawnGrJo2LOe1+pUq1UhdXEiGJtzuYGwNJeYDeiL2X3x-JaLLKwvhov2fHE+Dg4i67DgKFk4gJJzAFT6GKxAA4GbNCY7SeS4JSNXNxf9JUCZYh-lJiTQFI1mksaOjMV1SQouPaiXd2NiAGwew4Onm+ylGoMAqXA0EiOC3di3HlzbCeguZrru--SECEDBhvUFaSDAAB+EWpraDoaC4Yg4EQOn9osJbnsm2z6YMixpcCmryLBhxxEhpqYewUIAAV0BW-I1iEaHGBYA3fDiPT2BgaWXFSbxbeYB3CmdgKXJ14zcR2TA9bDlA0CwdQgA)
2) Acesse a URL para testar seu código JavaScript.

Limitações: Para evitar abusos, arquivos externos e conexões externas não são permitidos.

Libraries disponíveis: LZString + [GolfJS](https://github.com/pretpo/GolfJS)
